# expected-files.txt — exact allowlist for amd64 builds.
# Generated by `check-no-extras.sh` against a known-good image; review every
# entry below and regenerate when the build legitimately changes.
#
# Format:
#   - Blank lines and lines starting with `#` are ignored.
#   - `path/to/file`     → exact match.
#   - `path/to/dir/*`    → collapsed glob (the script rewrites the tar listing
#                          so an entire subtree appears as one line). Used for
#                          large auto-generated trees (zoneinfo, timezone/,
#                          extension/, tsearch_data/, timezonesets/).
#
# Per-arch: this file is amd64-only. arm64 builds use expected-files.arm64.txt.
# Per-major additions live in expected-files.pg<major>.txt.

# --- /bin/sh (required by PG's popen/system in initdb, pg_ctl, pg_upgrade) ---
bin/dash
bin/sh

# --- baked /etc (CNPG postgres UID 26 lives in passwd/group) ---
etc/group
etc/nsswitch.conf
etc/passwd

# --- glibc + libc runtime (ldd-resolved from postgres binaries) ---
lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libc.so.6
lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so.3
lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgcc_s.so.1
lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libicudata.so.76
lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libicui18n.so.76
lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libicuuc.so.76
lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/liblz4.so.1
lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libm.so.6
lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so.3
lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libstdc++.so.6
lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libxxhash.so.0
lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so.1
lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libzstd.so.1

# --- dynamic loader (amd64) ---
lib64/ld-linux-x86-64.so.2

# --- PostgreSQL common binaries ---
usr/lib/postgresql/${PG_MAJOR}/bin/clusterdb
usr/lib/postgresql/${PG_MAJOR}/bin/createdb
usr/lib/postgresql/${PG_MAJOR}/bin/createuser
usr/lib/postgresql/${PG_MAJOR}/bin/dropdb
usr/lib/postgresql/${PG_MAJOR}/bin/dropuser
usr/lib/postgresql/${PG_MAJOR}/bin/initdb
usr/lib/postgresql/${PG_MAJOR}/bin/pg_amcheck
usr/lib/postgresql/${PG_MAJOR}/bin/pg_archivecleanup
usr/lib/postgresql/${PG_MAJOR}/bin/pg_basebackup
usr/lib/postgresql/${PG_MAJOR}/bin/pg_checksums
usr/lib/postgresql/${PG_MAJOR}/bin/pg_config
usr/lib/postgresql/${PG_MAJOR}/bin/pg_controldata
usr/lib/postgresql/${PG_MAJOR}/bin/pg_ctl
usr/lib/postgresql/${PG_MAJOR}/bin/pg_dump
usr/lib/postgresql/${PG_MAJOR}/bin/pg_dumpall
usr/lib/postgresql/${PG_MAJOR}/bin/pg_isready
usr/lib/postgresql/${PG_MAJOR}/bin/pg_receivewal
usr/lib/postgresql/${PG_MAJOR}/bin/pg_recvlogical
usr/lib/postgresql/${PG_MAJOR}/bin/pg_resetwal
usr/lib/postgresql/${PG_MAJOR}/bin/pg_restore
usr/lib/postgresql/${PG_MAJOR}/bin/pg_rewind
usr/lib/postgresql/${PG_MAJOR}/bin/pg_upgrade
usr/lib/postgresql/${PG_MAJOR}/bin/pg_verifybackup
usr/lib/postgresql/${PG_MAJOR}/bin/pg_waldump
usr/lib/postgresql/${PG_MAJOR}/bin/postgres
usr/lib/postgresql/${PG_MAJOR}/bin/psql
usr/lib/postgresql/${PG_MAJOR}/bin/reindexdb
usr/lib/postgresql/${PG_MAJOR}/bin/vacuumdb

# --- PostgreSQL common internal libs (libpq + contrib + encoding conversions) ---

# --- NSS modules (hostname-based pg_hba, replication DNS) ---
usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libnss_dns.so.2
usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libnss_files.so.2

# --- PostgreSQL 18 share/ tree (initdb inputs, samples, encoding/timezone data) ---
usr/share/postgresql/${PG_MAJOR}/errcodes.txt
usr/share/postgresql/${PG_MAJOR}/extension/*
usr/share/postgresql/${PG_MAJOR}/information_schema.sql

usr/share/postgresql/${PG_MAJOR}/pg_ident.conf.sample
usr/share/postgresql/${PG_MAJOR}/pg_service.conf.sample
usr/share/postgresql/${PG_MAJOR}/postgres.bki
usr/share/postgresql/${PG_MAJOR}/postgresql.conf.sample
usr/share/postgresql/${PG_MAJOR}/psqlrc.sample
usr/share/postgresql/${PG_MAJOR}/snowball_create.sql
usr/share/postgresql/${PG_MAJOR}/sql_features.txt
usr/share/postgresql/${PG_MAJOR}/system_constraints.sql
usr/share/postgresql/${PG_MAJOR}/system_functions.sql
usr/share/postgresql/${PG_MAJOR}/system_views.sql
usr/share/postgresql/${PG_MAJOR}/timezone/*
usr/share/postgresql/${PG_MAJOR}/timezonesets/*
usr/share/postgresql/${PG_MAJOR}/tsearch_data/*

# --- system tzdata ---
usr/share/zoneinfo/*
